champagne.open-diff-uncommitted-command: Diff Current File Against Working Copy (Uncommitted Changes)
champagne.open-diff-head-command: Diff Current File Against Head Commit
champagne.open-diff-stack-command: Diff Current File Against Stack Base
champagne.revert-file-command: Revert Uncommitted Changes to Current File
settings.isl.openBeside.description: If true, files, diffs, and comparisons will open beside the existing Champagne panel instead of in the same View Column. Useful to keep Champagne open and visible when clicking on files.
settings.isl.showInSidebar.description: If true, Champagne will appear in the sidebar as a view. If false, Champagne will appear as a normal panel like an editor. Restart to take full effect.
settings.isl.showOpenOrFocusButtonOnEdit: Show the Open or Focus Champagne button on the active Editor's title/tab bar.
settings.commandPath.description: Path to the VCS executable (e.g. git, sl). Leave empty to use the default on your PATH. Restart required to take effect.
settings.showInlineBlame.description: Whether to show inline blame annotations next to your cursor when browsing files in supported repos.
settings.showDiffComments.description: Whether to show code review diff comments and inline code suggestions.
settings.diffViewMode.description: Whether to show code suggestions in a unified or split diff view.
settings.markConflictingFilesResolvedOnS: Whether to mark files with merge conflicts as resolved after saving them with no remaining conflict markers.
settings.comparisonPanelMode.description: Whether comparisons should always appear in a separate panel or only when Champagne is not active.
settings.comparisonPanelMode.enumDescrip: Show comparisons inside the Champagne window when Champagne is active, and otherwise use a new panel.
Always open a separate panel to view comparisons.
isl.title: Champagne
